mock_result.response:
Dependency Security Report:

- lodash@4.17.15: CVE-2021-23337 [HIGH] — prototype pollution via merge functions. Upgrade to 4.17.21+
- express@4.17.1: No critical CVEs but 4.18.x fixes minor issues. Upgrade recommended.
- jsonwebtoken@8.5.1: CVE-2022-23529 [HIGH] — arbitrary file read via crafted JWT secret. Upgrade to 9.0.0+
- axios@0.21.1: CVE-2021-3749 [HIGH] — ReDoS via crafted URLs. Upgrade to 0.27.2+

Action Required: 3 HIGH severity CVEs found. Run npm update or pin fixed versions immediately.
